summary: Comprehensive testing of İstanbul Salı Pazarı AVM web application completed. Both backend APIs and frontend functionality are working excellently with only minor issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Save button click intercepted by overlay element (Emergent badge)
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click works, functionality is intact

integration_issues.issue: Products created in admin may not appear in correct category filter on public site

passed_tests: Admin login with wrong password shows error
Get settings endpoint returns store data
Get categories returns 6 categories (Züccaciye, Hırdavat, etc.)
Admin stats endpoint returns KPI data
Public homepage loads with hero section
Hero stats display (Google rating, review count, categories, open hours)
Products section loads with category filter tabs
Map section shows Google Maps iframe
Contact form submission works with success message
Admin products page with add/edit functionality
Admin messages page with message detail view
Admin settings page loads with all fields
Products created in admin appear on public site
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Ensure product category filtering works correctly between admin creation and public display. The overlay click issue is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality.
